hero.title: Where Malayalam Roots Meet Anti-Gravity Flavor.
hero.description: Ver.Cafe - Roots is Thrissur’s modern specialty coffee sanctuary. We blend floating, weightless design with deeply grounded local Kerala flavors to bring you a premium sensory experience.

story.label: Our Story
story.title: Deeply Grounded,
story.paragraph1: In Malayalam, "Ver" (വേര്) means root. It represents our deep-seated connection to the rich soil, heritage, and unique spice trails of Kerala.
story.quote: "We root ourselves in authentic local ingredients, while elevating them using modern, avant-garde brewing techniques."
story.paragraph2: From cardamom-infused espresso to cold brew extracted with sweet tender coconut nectar, every cup we serve is a tribute to our home. We welcome you to experience Thrissur’s finest specialty coffee, served in a calm, modern space designed to make you feel light, floating, and at home.

signatures.title: Malabar Spiced Latte
signatures.desc: Double-shot espresso infused with cardamom, dried ginger, and locally sourced organic jaggery.

signatures.title: Roots Cold Brew
signatures.desc: 18-hour slow-steeped cold brew, cold-filtered and infused with sweet, fresh tender coconut nectar.

signatures.title: Cardamom Affogato
signatures.desc: Velvety double shot of hot espresso poured over premium house-crafted cardamom bean ice cream.

coffee.name: Single Origin Pour Over
coffee.desc: Locally sourced beans from Wayanad, brewed to bring out bright citrus and honey notes.

coffee.name: Traditional Espresso
coffee.desc: Double shot of our signature house blend with a rich hazelnut crema.

coffee.name: Classic Flat White
coffee.desc: Velvety steamed milk poured over a double ristretto shot.

coffee.name: Vanilla Bean Latte
coffee.desc: Espresso with house-made natural Madagascar vanilla syrup.

coffee.name: Kerala Jaggery Macchiato
coffee.desc: Espresso marked with micro-foam and a drizzle of local organic jaggery syrup.

infusions.name: Spiced Hibiscus Cold Brew Tea
infusions.desc: Refreshing cold steep of organic hibiscus flowers with a hint of cinnamon.

infusions.name: Tender Coconut Cold Brew
infusions.desc: Our signature cold brew layered with fresh, sweet tender coconut water.

infusions.name: Ginger Lemongrass Matcha
infusions.desc: Stone-ground Japanese matcha whisked with fresh ginger juice and lemongrass.

infusions.name: Cardamom Rose Latte
infusions.desc: Steamed milk with cardamon infusion and organic rosewater syrup (caffeine-free).

bakes.name: Banana Bread with Spiced Ghee
bakes.desc: Warm slice of moist banana bread served with a dollop of cardamom-spiced ghee.

bakes.name: Sourdough Croissant
bakes.desc: Classic flaky butter croissant made with our 48-hour wild yeast sourdough starter.

bakes.name: Jackfruit Almond Tart
bakes.desc: Sweet pastry crust filled with almond frangipane and caramelized local jackfruit.

bakes.name: Dark Chocolate Sea Salt Cookie
bakes.desc: Chewy double chocolate cookie topped with flaky sea salt from the Malabar coast.

location.address:
Ver.Cafe - Roots, MG Road,
Near Thrissur Round,
